Research shows how long it takes you to reconcile with your partner is critically important.

When it comes to long-lasting love, timing really is everything—especially after an argument.

New research suggests that couples who quickly mend emotional rifts, often within just 30 minutes, are significantly more likely to maintain a healthy, enduring relationship. 

This swift reconciliation interrupts the buildup of emotional distance and discourages negative communication cycles, creating space for trust and understanding to flourish.

Experts say that fast conflict repair isn’t just a nice habit—it’s one of the strongest predictors of relationship stability. By resolving disagreements early, couples strengthen their communication, build emotional resilience, and foster deeper intimacy. Over time, this pattern becomes a protective factor, shielding relationships from the erosion that unresolved tension can bring.

Source: Gottman, J. M., & Silver, N. (2015). The Seven Principles for Making Marriage Work. Harmony Books.

Hello from the owners of Sky Zone Columbia, MO‼️

We want to start this message by telling you, our valued guest, how much we appreciate you. When we opened our doors in 2018, we had a vision of providing an indoor solution for active, healthy fun for families in our area. As a community, we have survived so much together in the last 8 years. We began this journey as franchise partners of a family-owned corporation whose values aligned with ours. 

Because of that alignment, we felt confident that, together with the Sky Zone team, we would provide Columbia and the surrounding areas with an experience that benefited families, gave us a chance to enrich the community, and provided a safe place for your children to play, work, and grow up with us. Through it all, we have strived to maintain our small-town roots and our midwestern kindness at every corner.

As the corporate side of Sky Zone continues to grow and change, our family has made the decision to jump out of the corporate world and into a new era of independence. We invite you to join us on this journey. Over the next few months, we will be closed to give our facility a facelift and breathe life into our new brand. The last day to jump with us before this transition will be Dec. 17, 2025. 

When you see us next, we will officially be 100% family-owned and operated! Our facility will continue to be run by the same mother-daughter duo that has been with you from the start, but we're more than doubling the number of ways you can play in our facility and have the chance to carefully curate the new brand based on the feedback you've given us over the years. 

We want to continue to be a safe space to connect, compete, and grow together. Stay tuned for updates! This isn't goodbye...we'll be back soon and better than ever!

With love,
Emily, Nancy, Aaron, and the Jurgensmeyer Family

The process of forgiveness is reconciliation Reconciliation is a process ,not a quick event. It has clear stages, and both people must participate honestly for it to work. Here’s the healthiest way to understand it:

⸻

1. Acknowledgment of Harm

Reconciliation starts only when the hurt is recognized and named by both sides.
 • The person who caused harm acknowledges it without excuses.
 • The person who was hurt is allowed to express what the harm did to them.

Why it matters:
You can’t rebuild what hasn’t been openly admitted.

⸻

2. Accountability

This is where the responsible party takes full ownership of their actions.
 • No blame-shifting.
 • No “you made me do it.”
 • Clear statement: “This is what I did, and I understand the impact.”

Why it matters:
Without accountability, reconciliation is fake. It becomes just returning to the same cycle.

⸻

3. Honest Communication

Both people talk openly about:
 • How they feel
 • What they need
 • What must change

This stage requires:
 • Listening without interrupting
 • Understanding without attacking
 • Avoiding manipulation or guilt tactics

⸻

4. Boundaries and Changes

Reconciliation cannot happen unless:
 • Clear boundaries are set
 • Real changes are agreed upon
 • Patterns are addressed (not just the incident)

This may include:
 • Communication rules
 • Transparency
 • Personal therapy
 • Couples therapy

⸻

5. Consistent Behavior Over Time

Change is not proven by words.
It’s proven by consistent actions:
 • New habits
 • No repeated patterns
 • Reliability
 • Emotional safety

Time is the proof of real change. There is no shortcut here.

⸻

6. Rebuilding Trust

Trust isn’t instantly restored—it grows slowly:
 • Through honesty
 • Through follow-through
 • Through respect
 • Through empathy

Trust-building is usually the longest stage.

⸻

7. Emotional Reconnection

Only after safety and trust begin to return can emotional closeness rebuild:
 • Friendship
 • Partnership
 • Intimacy
 • Teamwork

Trying to reconnect before the earlier stages leads to repeated hurt.

⸻

8. Forgiveness (if desired)

Forgiveness is optional and only comes:
 • After accountability
 • After change
 • After healing

Forgiveness does not mean forgetting, pretending, or excusing.

⸻

9. New Relationship, Not the Old One

Healthy reconciliation doesn’t return you to “how things were.”
It builds:
 • New habits
 • New respect

As an oncology provider, one of the most concerning patterns I see is how often early warning signs are dismissed as “just getting older.”

Long before a cancer diagnosis, I frequently see things like:
• persistent fatigue that’s written off as aging
• muscle loss and declining strength
• rising inflammation on routine blood work
• worsening insulin resistance or blood sugar control
• low or borderline vitamin and nutrient levels
• unexplained changes in weight or appetite

Individually, these changes don’t raise alarms.
Together — and especially when they progress over time — they can reflect internal shifts that increase cancer risk.

This doesn’t mean these signs cause cancer or guarantee a diagnosis.
It means they deserve attention rather than dismissal.

Cancer prevention isn’t about panic or prediction.
It’s about recognizing patterns early, before disease becomes visible or symptomatic.

Blood work doesn’t diagnose cancer —
but it can help reveal trends years before a diagnosis is ever made.

If you want a clearer framework for which labs to monitor and how to interpret trends over time, the blood work guide is linked in my bio.

For educational purposes only. Not medical advice.

(Even if Your Credit 750+)

Most people only worry about Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion…
But there are TWO other bureaus deciding if you can even open a bank account before anybody even looks at your credit score.

They are:
• ChexSystems
• Early Warning Services (EWS)

And if you’ve ever had a bank close your account, overdraft it, or flag anything funny — your name is probably still sitting in one of these systems.

Here’s what they track:

ChexSystems watches your banking behavior:
✔ Overdrafts
✔ Unpaid bank fees
✔ Closed accounts
✔ Returned checks
✔ Any suspicious activity

If a bank ever shut your account down for “abuse,” “negative balance,” or even a small charge-off… trust me, it’s reported to ChexSystems, and it can stay there for up to years.

Wat zijn de overeenkomsten tussen de Moslimbroederschap en de Kharidjieten?

Nadat Shaykh Mishary Rashid Alafasy valselijk werd aangevallen door Ikhwaan al-Muslimien-predikers, kwam hij met een lezing over de overeenkomsten tussen de Khawaarij en de Ikhwaan al-Muslimien. Beiden hebben dezelfde missie, maar een andere visie. Beiden houden zich bezig met het zwartmaken van moslimleiders, hen aanvallen en het aanzetten tot opstanden.

Verder laat hij zien welke geloofsleer hij volgt en dat hij niets te maken heeft met de politieke sekte van de fitnazaaiers van de Ikhwaan al-Muslimien. De Shaykh haalt uitspraken aan van geleerden uit Saoedi-Arabië en van Shaykh al-Albaani رحمه الله, evenals lezingen van Shaykh Saalih Aal ash-Shaykh, waarin de gevaren van de sekten de Ikhwaan al-Muslimien worden verduidelijkt en weerlegd. Shaykh Mishary Rashid Alafasy gaat een stap verder en bestempeld de Ikhwaan al-Muslimien groepering voor het stelselmatig inzameling doen voor goede doelen en dit dan vervolgens stellen. 

Shaykh Mishary Rashid Alafasy heeft zich altijd beziggehouden met nuttige kennis, de Koran en het oproepen tot de middenweg. De Shaykh حفظه الله hield zich nooit bezig met aanvallen, roddelen of weerleggingen. Tot nu, doordat de schaamteloze sekte van Ikhwaan al-Muslimien-aanhangers hun pijlen op hem richtte, kwam hij met een verduidelijking over deze criminele sekte die door de Britten is opgericht. Hun doel is wereldwijde geldinzameling. De ene keer promoten zij een moderne islam, de andere keer kiezen ze weer een radicale weg telkens afgestemd op de “markt” en de actuele dilemma’s in de wereldpolitiek. Daarom hebben zij ook zoveel volgers in de islamitische wereld. Ondanks dat zij in de meerderheid zijn, bereiken zij niets anders dan geld in eigen zak stoppen en bestuursposities innemen bij stichtingen, verenigingen, moskeeën en liefdadigheidsinstellingen, en soms zelfs in regeringen van landen, waar zij de islam gebruiken als middel om stemvee te misleiden. Tussendoor hangen zij een marxistische ideologie aan.

Antisemitism can signal declining national health:

1. It reflects weakening social cohesion.
In healthy societies, pluralism and minority protections tend to be strong. When antisemitism becomes more common or more openly expressed, it often indicates fraying trust, increased polarization, and failures of institutions meant to safeguard marginalized groups.

2. It is historically correlated with political and economic stress.
Periods of economic insecurity, political upheaval, or cultural anxiety often coincide with spikes in antisemitic rhetoric or violence. Scapegoating becomes a way for people to displace collective stress onto a vulnerable minority — a pattern seen across many societies and eras.

3. It tracks with overall increases in hate-based incidents.
In the U.S., rising antisemitism tends to correlate with rising anti-Black, anti-Asian, anti-LGBTQ+, and anti-immigrant sentiment. A society experiencing an uptick in multiple forms of hate is typically one struggling with broader democratic and social health.

4. It is a warning sign for democratic erosion.
Democratic backsliding often begins with intensified attacks on minority groups. Antisemitism, because of its deep historical roots and symbolic power, is often one of the earliest indicators that norms of pluralism, rule of law, and civil rights are weakening.

5. It signals the spread of conspiracy thinking.
Antisemitic beliefs frequently intersect with conspiracy theories. When such narratives gain traction, they undermine shared reality and make it harder for societies to govern themselves effectively or respond to crises.

The Ministry of Information and Communications Technology (MoICT), led by Secretary Harold Msusa, in collaboration with the Public Private Partnership Commission (PPPC), convened the Second Project Steering Committee (PSC) Meeting for the Digital Malawi Acceleration Project (DMAP) in Zomba.

The meeting brought together senior government officials from the Department of eGovernment under MoICT, the Malawi Communications Regulatory Authority (MACRA), the Malawi Research and Education Network (MAREN), the National Registration Bureau (NRB), as well as representatives from the Ministries of Justice, Education, Finance, and Lands.

In his opening remarks, Msusa described DMAP as a key catalyst anchored in the Government’s policy agenda to modernize the public sector, strengthen digital governance, and unlock opportunities within the digital economy. 

He emphasized the importance of transitioning from planning to implementation, urging committee members to ensure that project activities deliver tangible results, value for money, and clear alignment with national development priorities.

Echoing these sentiments, Principal Secretary for the Department of eGovernment, Prosper Mopiwa, emphasized the need to fast-track the implementation of DMAP activities to ensure the project achieves its intended development objectives within the planned timeframe.

Key highlights of the meeting included progress updates on DMAP implementation, as well as in-depth discussions on financial and procurement reports, safeguards obligations, applicable standards, and implementation arrangements.

The meeting provided a vital platform for collaboration and strategic dialogue among key digital sector stakeholders, reaffirming the Government’s commitment to accelerating digital transformation and improving service delivery across all sectors of the economy.

Waxaanu Ninkii  Sheegay In Gabadhan oo Xaaskiisa ah ay aad ula Ildaran tahay wax adag oo  kasoo  baxay Carabka  hoostiisa. 
 Golos intuu sidaa u eegay halkii xanuunaysay Xaaska  ayuu Ninkii ku yidhi waan qalayaa  Beri Subaxa hore ii kaalaya 
  
Ninkii ayaase u sheegay Inuu ku talo jiray inuu Xaaska  Xamar  u qaado.  waxaanu Golos  ugu jawaabay Haaye waa Inoo Berito.
 
Markii ay naga tageen ayaa Anigoo aad uga naxay Nabarka Gabadha ka muuqda inuu halis yahayna aan arko  waxaan ku idhi Golosoow Maad iska deyn Ninku Xamar hayska qabtee. Haday dhimato inagaa laynugu leeyahaye.

Wuxuuse igu yidhi waan qalayaa
Subaxii dambe ayaa loo keenay si fudud buu u jaray wixii ku yaalay  oo aad moodaysay Carab kale.oo adag meeshii uu ka gooyayna wuu gubay. Waxaan Markhaati ka ahaa Gabadhii inay  Afar (4) Maalmood kadib caafimaaday. Ilaa iminkana way Nooshahay,  Xanuunkiina dib ugumu soo noqon. Xeerka Difaaca Maraykanka ee FY26 NDAA iyo sida uu JSL xidhiidhka ula leeyahay.

Ugu horeyn waa maxay FY- NDAA?  Gollaha Congress-ka Maraykanku sanad kasta waxa uu ansixyaa Xeerka loo yaqaano Xeerka Awoodsiinta Gaashaandhiga Maraykana( National Defense Authorization Act) iyada oo la raacinayo tirsiga sanadka uu khuseeyo tusaale ahaan FY2026. Hadaba dadka reer Somaliland waxaa lagu jaaha wareeriyey xeerkan iyo sida  uu ula xidhiidho JSL taasi qof kastaa uu dhinac ka istaagey si ka fog xaqiiqada jirta.

Halkan waxa aan ku iftiimin doonaa xaqiiqada jirta ee ku saabsan sida xeerkani uu xidhiidhka ula leeyahay iskaashiga Maraykanka iyo Somaliland wada yeelan doona dhawaan. Sidaa awgeed runtu wax ay tahay:

1. Horta Xeerka FY26 NDAA marnaba sanadkan laguma darin qormo ama qayb ka hadlaysa Somaliland 

2. Waxaa iyana been ah dadka leh waxaa Xeerka FY26 NDAA laga saaray qaybtii khusaysay Somaliland

3. Xeerka FY26 NDAA waa mid kamid ah xeerka loo yaqaan must-pass bills oo macnaheedu yahay Xeerarka ay khasabka tahay in la ansixiyo sanad kasta, sidaa awgeed xeerarkan waxaa mararka qaar lagu lifaaqaa Xeerka kale ee aan sidooda si gaar ah loogu ansixin karin ee yeelan kara mucaaridad badan ama jiitamid xaga waqtiga ah. Hadaba iyada oo taasi laga duulayo Congress-ka Maraykanku waxa ay ku lifaaqaan shuruucda kale ee muhiim ah isla markaan khasabka tahay in la anasixiyo si ay xeerarkan kalena ugu dhex ansaxaan ama loogu dhex xambaaro. 

4.  Xildhibaan Brian Mast oo ah Gudoomiyaha Guddida Arrimaha Dibadda Wakiilada Maraykanka ayaa bishii September 2025 hindisay xeer lambar H.R. 5300 kaas oo ah Xeerka Awoodsiinta Wasaarada Arimaha Dibada Maraykanka. Macawiisleyda, waa geesiyaasha dhabta ah ee ka dhashay dadkooda, kana soo baxay xanuunka iyo dulmiga argagixisadu ku hayeen shacabka. Waa dad aan kursi iyo dano gaar ah u dagaallamayn, balse u istaagay difaaca diinta, dalka iyo dadkooda. Markii argagixisadu isku dayeen inay baabi’iyaan noloshii, karaamadii iyo mustaqbalkii dadka deegaanka, Macawiisleydu waxay noqdeen gaashaan adag oo hortagay shartaas.

Geesinimadoodu waa mid lagu faano, go’aankooduna waa mid ka dhashay xaq jacayl iyo dal jaceyl. Iyagoo hub yar iyo agab kooban wata ayay haddana muujiyeen in iimaanka, midnimada iyo xaq u hiilintu ka awood badan yihiin cabsi iyo argagixiso. Waxay caddeeyeen in argagixisadu aysan ka adkaan karin dad isku duuban oo go’aansaday inaysan mar dambe aqbalin dulmi iyo cabburin.

Macawiisleydu waxay dhiirrigelin u noqdeen dhammaan shacabka Soomaaliyeed, iyagoo muujiyay in amniga iyo xorriyadda lagu gaari karo is-kaashi, isku kalsooni iyo adkaysi. Dhiiggooda iyo naf-hurnimadooda waxay dhaxal u noqon doontaa jiilasha dambe, taariikhdana waxay ku qori doontaa bog dahab ah.

Waxaan leenahay: Macawiisley, waad mahadsan tihiin. Waad astaan u tihiin geesinimo, waddaniyad iyo adkaysi. Ilaahay ha idin garab galo, ha idin dhowro, hana idinka dhigo kuwii sabab u noqda nabad, xasilooni iyo mustaqbal ifaya oo dalku yeesho. Soomaaliya idin ayay ku faanaysaa. 🇸🇴

Argagixisadu dhab ahaantii ma aha awood aan la jebin karin, waa kooxo ku dhisan cabsi, khiyaano iyo marin-habaabinta diinta. Marka laga qaado cabsida ay ku nool yihiin, waxaa soo baxda tabar-yarradooda dhabta ah. Waxay ku xoog yeesheen kala fogaansho, jahawareer iyo aaminka dadka, balse marka shacabku garto xaqiiqda, ay is abaabulaan, iskuna duubnaadaan, argagixisadu si fudud ayay u daciifaan.

Taariikhdu marar badan ayay muujisay in argagixisadu ka baqaan wacyiga, midnimada iyo go’aanka shacabka. Ma awoodaan inay wajahaan dad u diyaarsan inay difaacaan noloshooda, sharafkooda iyo mustaqbalkooda. Waxay ku nool yihiin hanjabaad iyo qarsoodi; marka la iftiimiyo, waa burburaan.

Sidaas darteed, argagixisada waa la iska celin karaa marka la helo midnimo bulsho, wacyigelin sax ah, iyo kalsooni ay dadku isku qabaan. Guusha dhabta ahi waxay timaaddaa marka shacabka iyo dowladnimadu isku jihaan hal ujeeddo: in dalkeennu noqdo mid nabad ah, xor ah, oo ka madax bannaan cabsi iyo xagjirnimo. Soomaaliya waa ka adkaan kartaa, waana ka adkaan doontaa. 🇸🇴

H.E. Abdirizak Zangaab

Farriin muhiim ah: Aqoonsiga Muwaadinimada (National ID) iyo Muhiimadda uu leeyahay hoos kala soco.

-Waxaa laga gaadhi doonaa wakhti uu qof aan haysan National ID aanan lagu daweyn doonin isbitaallada dowlada

- Wakhti qofkii aan lahayn aqoonsiga National ID uusan kiraysan karin hotel, oo ay safaradiisu u xannibi doonaan.

- Wakhti qofkii aan haysan national ID uusan Ka gudbi karin keelaayada baadhitaannada amniga (Checkpoints).

- Wakhti qofkii aan haysan uu waayi doono dhamasn adeegyada muhiimka ah sida waxbarasho, caafimaad iyo codbixinta doorashooyinka, safarada dibadda iyo gudaha iwm.

Waxaa intaas dheer in mustaqbalka, qof kasta uu, u baahnaan doono aqoonsiga national ID-ga si uu uhelo adeeg dowladeed oo noloshiisa saameeya.

Hadaba, inta adeega muhiimka ah, laga helayo degmo kasta iyo magaalo kasta oo Deegaanka ka mid ah, bulshada waxaa looga baahan yahay in ay fursaddan ka faa’iidaystaan si aysan berri u waayin xuquuqdooda dastuuriga.

Haddii aad maanta weydo fursad ama wakhti aad ku qaadato isaga oo si fudud uga heli karto degmada aad ku nooshahay, ogow berri laga yaabo in adeegga la joojiyo, ama shardi adag lagu xiro. 

Haddii aad maanta qaadan weydo, berri ma jiri karo, qof kugu meteli kara muwaadinimadaada marka lagaa waayo national ID-ga. Aqoonsiga qaran ee national ID waa xuquuqdaada, fadlan qaado maanta.

🩺 Early Warning Signs of Diabetes You Shouldn’t Ignore

Diabetes often develops quietly, and many people live with high blood sugar for years without realizing it. Recognizing early warning signs can help prompt timely testing and medical care. One of the most common signs is increased thirst and frequent urination, especially at night, caused by excess glucose in the blood. Unexplained weight loss, even while eating normally or more than usual, may occur when the body can’t properly use glucose for energy.

Many individuals experience constant hunger, fatigue, and weakness, as cells are deprived of fuel. Blurred vision can result from fluid changes in the eyes due to fluctuating blood sugar levels. Another important sign is slow-healing cuts, wounds, or frequent infections, which happen when circulation and immune function are affected.

Some people notice tingling or numbness in the hands and feet, an early sign of nerve involvement, while dark, velvety skin patches around the neck, armpits, or groin may indicate insulin resistance (acanthosis nigricans).

It’s important to remember that symptoms alone do not diagnose diabetes. Many signs overlap with other conditions or lifestyle factors. Blood tests and medical evaluation are essential for an accurate diagnosis. Early detection and proper management can significantly reduce the risk of long-term complications and support better overall health.

Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud waxaa lagu ammaanaa dhowr qodob oo waaweyn, inkastoo sidoo kale uu wajahayo dhaliilo. Kuwa ugu badan ee lagu ammaano waa:

1. Ka qaadista cunaqabateynta hubka

Xilligii hoggaamintiisa ayaa Soomaaliya laga qaaday cunaqabateyntii hubka ee Qaramada Midoobay, taas oo kor u qaaday awoodda qaranka iyo difaaca dalka.

2. Dagaalka Al-Shabaab

Wuxuu bilaabay dagaal ballaaran oo ka dhan ah Al-Shabaab, isagoo kaashanaya ciidamada qaranka iyo shacabka (Macawiisley).

Deegaanno badan ayaa laga xoreeyay kooxdaas.

3. Dib-u-dhiska xiriirka caalamiga ah

Soomaaliya ayuu dib ugu soo celiyay miiska caalamka, xiriir fiicana la yeeshay dalal iyo hay’ado badan.

Taasi waxay keentay taageero dhaqaale iyo mid amni.

4. Deyn-cafinta (Debt Relief)

Xukuumaddiisa ayaa door weyn ka qaadatay dhameystirka deyn-cafinta Soomaaliya, taas oo albaab u furtay horumar iyo maalgelin.

5. Dhiirrigelinta wada-hadalka siyaasadeed

Inkastoo uu jiro khilaaf, haddana waxaa lagu ammaanaa isku dayga wada-hadal ee dowlad-goboleedyada iyo dhinacyada siyaasadda.

6. Xasilinta hay’adaha dowliga ah

Waxaa la arkay dadaal lagu xoojinayo hay’adaha qaranka, gaar ahaan amniga, maaliyadda, iyo dib-u-habeynta maamulka.

Gunaanad

Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh waxaa lagu ammaanaa dagaalka argagixisada, deyn-cafinta, iyo dib u soo celinta sumcadda Soomaaliya, inkastoo weli ay jiraan caqabado amni, siyaasadeed iyo mid dhaqaale.

Dalal iyo Ururro Caalami ah oo si Adag uga Soo Horjeestay Aqoonsiga Israa’iil ee Maamulka Somaliland

Dalal iyo ururro caalami ah ayaa si isku mid ah u muujiyay diidmo adag oo ka dhan ah aqoonsiga Israa’iil ee maamulka Somaliland, iyagoo mar kale adkeeyay taageerada buuxda ee ay u hayaan madaxbannaanida, midnimada, iyo wadajirka dhuleed ee Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya.

Boqortooyada Sacuudiga ayaa caddeysay garab-istaagga Jamhuuriyadda Fadaraalka ah ee Soomaaliya, iyadoo aqoonsiga Israa’iil ku tilmaantay tallaabo sharci-darro ah oo ka hor imaneysa xeerarka caalamiga ah.

Jamhuuriyadda Ciraaq, oo hadda guddoomiyaha Jaamacadda Carabta, ayaa sheegtay in tallaabadan ay xadgudub ku tahay madaxbannaanida Soomaaliya, isla markaana ay khatar ku tahay amniga iyo xasilloonida Geeska Afrika.

Jamhuuriyadda Yemen ayaa si cad u diidday tallaabo kasta oo wax u dhimaysa midnimada Qaranka Soomaaliyeed, gaar ahaan xiriir ama aqoonsi u dhexeeya Israa’iil iyo maamulka Somaliland.

Dowladda Kuwait ayaa mar kale caddeysay taageerada buuxda ee ay u hayso madaxbannaanida, midnimada iyo wadajirka dhuleed ee Soomaaliya, iyadoo si adag u diidday tallaabo kasta oo hal-dhinac ah oo lagu doonayo in lagu aqoonsado gobol ka mid ah dhulka Soomaaliya. Kuwait waxay arrintaas ku tilmaantay mid ka hor imaneysa sharciga caalamiga ah, isla markaana adkaysay garab-istaagga ay la taagan tahay dowladda iyo hay’adaha sharciga ah ee Soomaaliya.

Boqortooyada Urdun ayaa xaqiijisay taageeradeeda buuxda ee midnimada iyo amniga Soomaaliya, iyadoo aqoonsiga Israa’iil ku tilmaantay mid ka soo horjeeda Axdiga Qaramada Midoobay.

Jaamacadda Carabta iyo Ururka Iskaashiga Islaamka (OIC) ayaa si wadajir ah u cambaareeyay tallaabada Israa’iil, iyagoo ku tilmaamay faragelin aan la aqbali karin oo ka dhan ah sharciga caalamiga ah, waxayna ku baaqeen in la ixtiraamo madaxbannaanida iyo midnimada dhuleed ee Soomaaliya, lana ilaaliyo amniga iyo xasilloonida gobolka.

JALALAQSI: DEGMO AY KA MAQAN TAHAY CADAALAD, MAAMUL IYO SHARCI

Degmada Jalalaqsi maanta kama muuqayo maamul sharciyad leh oo ku dhisan sinaan, caddaalad iyo wada-jir bulsho. Waxa jira xaalad si cad uga hor imaanaysa mabaa’diida dowladnimo, isla markaana dhaawacaysa kalsoonida ay bulshada ku qabto hay’adaha maamulka.

1.Isku-uruurinta awoodda iyo eexda qabyaaladeed.

Guddoomiyaha degmada, taliyaha saldhigga iyo hoggaanka ciidanka deegaanka waxaa la isugu geeyay hal beel. Arrintaas waxay si toos ah u burinaysaa caddaaladdii, isla-xisaabtankii iyo matalaaddii bulsho ee degmadu u baahnayd. Su’aasha taagan waxeey tahay: sidee ayay beelaha kale ee wada dega degmada u heli karaan cadaalad marka awooddu ku urursan tahay reer keliya?

2.Maamul beeleed ma noqon karo maamul sharci ah,

Sharci ahaan iyo siyaasad ahaanba, degmo maamulkeedu ku dhisan yahay hal reer ma noqon karo maamul rasmi ah. Mana horseedi karo nabad iyo horumar degmo

3.Ciidan la’aan dowladeed iyo sharci-jabin

Degmada Jalalaqsi kama jiro ciidan dowladeed oo dhameystiran (Boolis, Nabad-sugid, Asluub, iyo Ciidan Maxkamadeed). Haddana, si layaab leh, waxaa jira xarumo lagu sheego xabsi, hadna dad lagu xiraayo iyada oo aan jirin maxkamad iyo hannaan sharci. Tani waa sharci-jabin cad iyo ku tumasho xuquuqda muwaadiniinta.

4.Kala-dirid ciidan bulsho oo loo dhan yahay

Muddo dheer degmada waxaa sugayay ciidamo deegaanka ah (kuwa loo yaqaanno Macawiisley), kuwaas oo ka soo kala jeeday dhammaan beelaha wada dega degmada, kana shaqeynayay amniga guud. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, ninka sheeganaya maamulka degmada oo leh hab-dhaqan u eg ka moryaanimada ayaa kala diray ciidankaas, kana reebay xubno gaar ah oo isku reeyahiin isaga oo ku beddelay kuwo uu isku reer yahay.

5. Magacaabis aan sharci ahayn iyo fowdo bulsho.Mid ka mid ah dadka ay isku beesha yahiin ayaa si aan sharci ahayn loogu magacaabay taliye saldhig, taas oo keentay jahawareer amni, kalsooni-darro bulsho iyo isku dhacyo u dhexeeya beelihii dariska ahaa. Dhacdooyin foolxun oo isdaba-joog ah ayaa ka dhashay tallaabooyinkan khaldan, kuwaas oo si toos ah loogu eedeynayo hoggaanka hadda jira.

Gunaanad iyo baaq siyaasadeed

Bulshada Jalalaqsi waxay u baahan tahay:
Maamul loo dhan yahay oo sharciyad ku dhisan Ciidamo dowladeed oo rasmi ah, kana madax-bannaan qabyaalad Maxkamad iyo nidaam cadaaladeed oo hufan
In awoodda laga qaado shaqsiyaad ku shaqeeya magac maamul balse ficil ahaan ah hoggaamiye-kooxeedyal ah

Jalalaqsi uma baahna maamul reer keliya ah, waxay u baahan tahay maamul bulsho, sharci iyo cadaalad ku dhisan. Haddii aan la sixin jihada qaldan ee hadda lagu socdo, mas’uuliyadda wixii ka dhasha waxay dusha ka saaran tahay kuwa maanta sheeganaya hoggaan maamul degmo iyo kuwii keenay meshaa uu ugu horeeyo madaxweyne ku xigeenka hirshabeele Dr Dageed

Mediation is not about proving wrongdoing.
And that doesn’t mean your pain isn’t real.

It means mediation isn’t the place where pain gets prosecuted.

Mediation is about creating agreements that survive court.

Most of the “evidence” people bring…texts, screenshots, affairs, old arguments do not
move negotiations.
And emotional evidence often weakens your position.

Here’s the difference no one explains:

Courts care about legal relevance.
Mediators care about resolution viability.
The other party cares about risk and cost.

So if what you’re bringing in doesn’t change
money, parenting outcomes, or legal risk, 
it’s probably just noise.

I will validate your experience.
I will not validate a strategy that keeps you stuck.

Because the more you vent, the less strategic you become.

And what I see over and over is this:

People over-invest in being right and  under-prepare to get what they actually need.

Mediation rewards clarity.
Not character assassination.

If you want help turning emotion into leverage, I offer mediation prep ..$35 for 30 minutes.
Link in bio.

**NABAD IYO XASILLOONI AYAA LAGU HELIKARAA RABITAANKEENNA**
“FARIIN KU SOCOTA SHACABKA IYO HALDOORKA”
1- Fariin Ku Socota Shacabka
Waxaan si ixtiraam, sharaf iyo wadaninimo ku dheehan tahay ula hadlayaa shacabkayga sharafta leh ee ku nool degmooyinkeenna, gaar ahaan degmada Borama, kuwaas oo muujinaya dareen masuuliyadeed iyo difaac dhab ah oo ku wajahan dhulkooda, karaamadooda iyo masiirkooda.
Halganka aynu ku jirnaa waa halgan xaq ah, waana mid ay inta badan bulshadu qalbigooda idin kala jiraan. Qofna ma dafiri karo qiimaha iyo micnaha ay leedahay in xuquuqdeena loo istaago. Hase yeeshee, waxaa lama huraan ah in tallaabo kasta oo aynu qaadeyno ay noqoto mid miyir-qab, taxaddar iyo mas’uuliyad ku dhisan.
Waa in aynu si cad u kala saarnaa difaaca dhulka iyo burburinta nolosha dadka nugul. Ma aha halgan hooyada miskiinta ah ee bacadka ku iibinaysa yaanyada ee qaadhaankana bixinaysa, nolol-maalmeedkeeda la wiiqo. Kuwaasi waa dadkeennii, waana laf-dhabarta bulshada; mana istaahilaan culays iyo dhibaato dheeraad ah.
Halgankeennu ma aha  inuu noqdo mid lagu kala jabinayo midnimadeenna, balse waa inuu noqdaa mid sii xoojiya wadajirka, una horseeda guul iyo sharaf. Sidoo kale, ma aha mid lagu burburinayo magaalooyinkeenna, gaar ahaan Borama, ee waa inuu noqdaa mid lagu ilaalinayo karaamadeeda, nabaddeenna iyo mustaqbalkeenna.
Sidaas darteed, waxaan ugu baaqayaa dhammaan shacabka:
• In la is dejiyo
• In nabadda magaalada si wadajir ah loo ilaaliyo
• In la fahmo in xasilloonida Borama ay tahay dufaaca ugu horreeya ee halgan keenna aysan jirinna cid innaga burburin karta oo deegaan kale ka timaadda, balse ay mudan tahey gacmaheenna iyo fikirkeennu uusan noqonin bur-buriye, joojiye-dhaqdhaqaaqa nolosha.
• Inuu noqdo mid xoojiya nolosha, xasiliya ubadka, taageera dadka nugul. 
• Halla arko idinkoo gacmaha isu qabsanaya caawinta dadka nugul, oo u adeegaya degenaanshaha si nabdoon.  
2. Fariin Ku Socota Maamulka iyo Haldoorka Bulshada
Waxaan Ilaahay uga baryayaa inuu sharafkiina iyo karaamadiina kor u qaado, anigoo qiraya dadaalka mas’uuliyadeed ee aad ku ilaaliseen isu-dheellitirnaanta iyo nabadgelyada shacabka dareenkoodu kacsan yahay ee isugu soo baxaya suuqyada iyo goobaha dadweynaha.
Haddana, waxaan si cad u aaminsanahay in maamulka gobolka iyo degmada Borama, iyo sidoo kale haldoorka bulshada — oo ay ka mid yihiin culimaa’udiinka, duubabka dhaqanka, aqoonyahanka iyo waalidiinta — ay waajib ku tahay inay si joogto ah uga shaqeeyaan xasillinta magaalada, xaafad-xaafad iyo qoys qoys, iyagoo ka fogaanaya tallaabooyin cabburin iyo cadaadis keeni kara sii kicinta dareenka shacabka. 
Waqtigan oo kale kuma habboona tallaabooyin ku dhisan xoog iyo amar dawladnimo oo qallafsan; balse waxa aad ugu habboon muujinta dabacsanaan, isdareen, wada-tashi, is-maqal, iyo wacyigelin joogto ah, si dib loogu dhiso kalsoonida u dhexeysa bulshada iyo maamulka.
Sidoo kale, waa lama huraan in shacabka si joogto ah loola wadaago warbixin cad oo ku saabsan tabashooyin kooda, loona muujiyo in arrimahaasi hawshoodu socoto iyo halka ay marayaan. Taasi waa dariiqa ugu habboon ee lagu dejin karo dareenka kacsan laguna ilaalin karo nabadda, lagagana hortagi karo kafaa’ideysiga danaha shisheeyaha.

What needs to stop being called “wrong” is how mothers survive. 
Sleeping with your baby, holding them close — these things are judged so easily. In the beginning, I felt nothing for weeks. I couldn’t understand it, couldn’t hold her, couldn’t bond. I loved her, but it didn’t feel like the love I was supposed to feel, and that broke me.

As she’s grown, I’ve become desperate to be close to her. I never want her to feel distance, or absence, or loneliness. I lost so much time at the start, and I’ll carry that forever. I was judged for it, and society makes you feel ashamed for how you cope. I used to judge parents who shared their beds with their toddlers too — and now I regret that deeply. I never want my baby to feel alone again ❤️

This kind of grief is confusing. 
There’s no one to blame, no clean ending. 
Just a tender knowing that the warmth you were reaching for never fully arrived. 
And that ache stays tucked into your body, your choices, your longing for softness.
Grieving this isn’t betrayal. It’s honesty.
It’s honoring the child who adapted instead of being held.
And in naming it, you begin to offer yourself the care you once waited for.

#motherwound #healing

Policy Brief December 2025
 

Preventing and Countering Extremism Leading to Terrorism in Somalia and the Wider Region in the Aftermath of Israel’s Recognition of Somaliland

Key Messages

•  Israel’s recognition of Somaliland is legally null under international law and does not alter Somalia’s sovereignty or territorial integrity, yet it constitutes a high-salience political shock whose symbolic and narrative effects elevate the risk of violent extremism in Somalia’s fragile post-conflict context.

•  The recognition has already generated direct and verifiable extremist reactions, including explicit threat signaling and propaganda recalibration by violent extremist actors, demonstrating that the development has been operationalized ideologically despite the absence of any material Israeli presence on the ground.

•  Extremist mobilization in Somalia is driven primarily by perception, symbolism, and narrative opportunity rather than legal status, and the recognition levels up thresholds for radicalization by fusing local sovereignty disputes with transnational jihadist narratives.

•  The most serious and enduring danger lies in indirect and cumulative effects—legitimacy stress, political polarization, grievance amplification, and narrative convergence—which gradually erode social resilience and normalize extremist discourse over time.

•  Somalia now faces a dual escalation pathway combining intensified homegrown radicalization with renewed transnational jihadist engagement, producing hybrid, decentralized, and adaptive threats that are increasingly difficult to detect and deter through traditional security measures alone.
•  Escalation is not inevitable, but containment depends on prevention-first governance, strategic restraint, disciplined narrative management, and whole-of-government coordination through TUBSAN, supported by community-centered prevention and lawful disruption of extremist enabling ecosystems.

•  Inaction is not a neutral option; failure to respond early and coherently would normalize extremist narratives, accelerate recruitment, undermine state legitimacy, and risk reversing decades of Somali and international investment in stabilization, peacebuilding, and counterterrorism.
Contextual Overview

This policy brief sets out the official position of the Federal Government of Somalia on the evolving risks of violent extremism leading to terrorism following Israel’s recognition of Somaliland. Issued through the Tubsan National Centre for Counterterrorism and Preventing Violent Extremism (NCT-PVE), it reflects Somalia’s prevention-oriented security doctrine and commitment to anticipatory governance. The Federal Government affirms unequivocally that the recognition has no legal validity under international law and does not alter Somalia’s sovereignty, territorial integrity, or political unity, as affirmed by the UN Charter, the Constitutive Act of the African Union, and consistent UN Security Council practice.

While legally null, the recognition is not security-neutral. In fragile contexts, symbolic political acts can activate grievances, accelerate polarization, and amplify extremist narratives. Extremist actors operate on perception and symbolism, not legal logic, making it necessary to distinguish clearly between juridical irrelevance and security relevance

Analytical Framework and Risk Dynamics

The brief applies the Preventing Extremism Leading to Terrorism (PRELT) framework, which understands terrorism as the end-point of a progressive escalation pathway involving grievance formation, polarization, moral authorization, mobilization, and violence. Israel’s recognition of Somaliland functions as a catalytic event that activates existing grievances and interacts with structural vulnerabilities such as political exclusion, identity sensitivities, and regional instability. The recognition has produced direct and verifiable extremist reactions, including explicit threats and propaganda shifts by Al-Shabaab and ideologically aligned networks. More critically, indirect effects—legitimacy stress, grievance amplification, and narrative convergence—pose the greatest long-term risk by elevating baseline susceptibility to radicalization and making future trigger events more potent.

Threat Trajectories, Response, and Conclusion

Somalia faces an emerging threat architecture characterized by dual escalation pathways: intensified homegrown radicalization and renewed transnational jihadist engagement. 

These pathways interact and hybridize, producing adaptive and decentralized threats that are difficult to detect and deter. Scenario analysis points to containment as the best-case outcome, localized escalation as the most likely trajectory, and regionalized transnational escalation as the worst case. 

The Federal Government’s response is based on prevention-first governance, strategic restraint, and whole-of-government coordination through TUBSAN. 

Priority measures include disciplined strategic communications, community-centered prevention, lawful disruption of extremist enabling ecosystems, and alignment across federal and Federal Member State authorities. 

Inaction is not neutral; failure to act early and coherently would normalize extremist narratives, accelerate recruitment, undermine state legitimacy, and risk reversing decades of stabilization gains. Strategic patience, prevention-led governance, and collective responsibility remain Somalia’s most effective defenses.

Markii uu sannadka 2025 bilaabmayay, waxaan u haysanney inuu yahay sannadkayagii, haa, sannadkii badhaadha iyo farxada qoyskayaga.

Waxaanu aniga iyo xaaskaygii aan jeclaa isla eegi jirnay qorshaha aanu nolosha ka leenahay sannadkan cusub, wixii naga qabyo ahaa iyo waxa ugu muhiimsan ee ay tahay inaanu sannadkan bilaabmaya qabsano. Anagoo sawiranayna mustaqbalka, dhisidda guriga, korriinka carruurta, iyo safarro aan ku talagelnay inaan dunida ku marno. 

Hamdi waxay ahayd qofka aan indhaha ku kala qaado waa kasta oo noo barya, qorshe kasta oo aan dejinayna iyada ayaa udub-dhexaad u ahayd, sidoo kale qofka ugu horeeya ee qorshayaasha soo jeedisa ayay ahayd .

Ma aanan ogayn in qalinka Illaahay uu qoray inuu sannadkani noqon doono kii isugu kaayo danbeeyay , sidoo kalena uu noqon doono bogeedii ugu danbeeyay nolosheeda adduunka.

Maalin Jimce ah , bishuna ahayd Decembar 5, 2025, saacaduna dul taagnayd abaaro 10:18 subaxnimo ayay adduunka ka tagtay, waxayna ahayd isla maalintii uu Iftiinka gurigu naga damay .

Dhammaan qorshayaashii aan haysannay 2025 oo gabo-gabo ahaa waxay ku dumeen hal maalin gudaheed oo madaxayagii mijo u rogay .

Decembar 5, 2025, waxay ahayd maalintii uu adduunkayagu  naga istaagay. Waxay ahayd maalintii aan sagootiyey Beerlula oo ahayd xaaskaygii, saaxiibadaydii nolosha, iyo sawjaddii boos kasta oo noloshayda ka mid ah ii buuxisay ee qurxinaysay aduunkan.

Waxay ahayd hooyada dhashay carruurtayda ee naxariista baddan lahayd , tii guriga u ahayd nuurka iyo iftiinka, anigana ii ahayd garabka aan ku tiirsado marka ay dunidu igu cuslaato. 

Maalintaas wixii ka dambeeyay, gurigu wuxuu noqday gidaarro aamusan, carruurtuna waxay waayeen gacantii jilicda sanayd ee madaxa u salaaxi jirtay iyo naxariistii ay dunnida ku haysteen .

𝓚𝓾𝓻𝓼𝓲𝓰𝓲𝓲 𝓕𝓪𝓭𝓱𝓲𝓰𝓪 ;

Habeennada qaar, waxaan isku arkaa anigoo weli fadhiya halkii fadhiga ee aanu ku kaftami jirnay, isku dacaayadayn jirnay, mararka qaarkoodna aanu filim yar ku wada daawan jirnay .

Waxaanu daganayn guri wayn oo ay yaalaan wax kasta oo aad guri uga baahan tahay, waxay ka fikiri jirtay inaanu cuno , cunto caafimaad baddan, waxayna ku dadaali jirtay inay ka jawaabto dalabaadkayaga aan dhamaadka lahayn oo madbakha kamay bixi jirinba .

Markay cuntada noo kariso ayay haddana noo soo guri jirtay sidaas ayaanu ku noolayn  sannadihii la soo dhaafay oo dhan , may ahayn hooyo iyo xaas qudha ee qof Illaahay noo soo diray ayay ahayd oo boos kasta noo buuxisay aniga iyo caruurta.

Subaxdii hadaan ka hor kaco, waxay iga codsan jirtay inaan u sameeyo koob shaaha oo green tea ah , halkaas oo aan u dhigi jiray fadhiga .Imika subaxdii markaan soo kaco ee aan eego halkii aan shaaha u dhigi jiray ee ay ku cabi jirtay oo madhan ayay ilmo iga qubataa , haa, ilmo aanan joojin karin oo sida roobka isaga socota ! 

Waxa imika iigu xanuunka badan waa markay carruurtu habeenkii toosaan ama ay xanuusadaan ee ay  ku dhawaaqaan erayga  ‘’Hooyo" iyagoo u yeedhaya hooyadood.

Daqiiqadaas ayaan dareemaa culeyska adduunka ee dusha iga saarmay , waxaan isku dayaa inaan u noqdo aabbe iyo hooyaba, laakiin anoo ilmaynaya oo ilmada xejisan kari waayay ayaan is arkaa .

Inaan weyno Xamda Beerlula waxay la mid tahay anigoo waayay qayb ka mid ah naftayda oo aan marnaba soo laaban doonin, haa, marna soo laaban doonin oo xaqiiq ah .

 • 𝒞𝒾𝒷𝒶𝒶𝒹𝒶𝒹𝒶 𝒜𝓁𝓁𝑒: Inaan u dhawaado Illaahay, carruurtana ku koriyo waddada toosan ee ay hooyadood jeclayd.

• 𝒳𝓊𝓈𝓊𝓊𝓈 𝑅𝑒𝑒𝒷: Inaan caruurta u noqdo wehel, una sheego in hooyadood ay ahayd mucjisadii noloshooda soo martay, ifka hadday isku waayeena, ay aakhiro iyo Janadda ku kulmi doonaan.

The pain of having a baby and not hear him is one of the worst feelings I think I have ever felt. Going home knowing I'll never get to change his diaper or watch him take his first steps I'll never kno what his first word would have been, what color his hair would have been or the color of his eyes I'll never get to hold him when his said or feel that joy in my heart when he's excited about something. I'll never kno the bond he was supposed to have with his brothers I won't get to know the feeling of having three little boys drive me crazy or what it be like planning his birthday or if he would like Superman or Batman what would be his favorite show or favorite color. I'll never kno the feeling of hearing his little feet trample thru the house or hearing his little voice echo from the other room yelling for me to show me the same thing he done showed me 100x before hand. Overall I'll never kno what it would have been like to have been his Mama....There's an emptiness inside of me that will never go away...

Significant Weather Threat Map
Friday, 2 January 2026
 
QLD:
Scattered storms with sudden downpours and gusty winds are expected in northern QLD. One or two of the storms in the northern interior and near the coast between about Cairns and Townsville may become severe for locally heavy rainfall.
Moderate to locally heavy rainfall may persist near the Herbert and Lower Burdekin coast. On average, further 24 hour totals of 50 to 150mm with locally higher totals are possible.
Marginal potential exists for one or two of the storms in part of southern QLD to briefly become severe for locally heavy rainfall but most, if not all storms are unlikely to be severe in this region.

NSW:
Marginal potential exists for one or two of the storms in part of northern NSW to briefly become severe for locally heavy rainfall, large hail, or damaging winds but most, if not all storms are unlikely to be severe in this region and in the eastern interior.

SA:
Isolated non-severe storms are possible in northwestern SA.

NT:
Isolated storms are expected in western and northern parts of the NT, tending scattered over the Top End. 
While non-severe cells are likely to dominate, a few of the cells over the northern areas will need monitoring in case their rain rates and wind gusts get closer to severe criteria than expected.

WA:
Isolated to scattered storms are expected in northern and central WA.
A fire danger rating of Extreme will be present in the Swan Inland North, Swan Inland South and Brockman districts.

🌿 Peace Reset — For Me 🌿

I release the need to be understood by someone who chose cruelty over communication.
I do not carry words that were spoken from hurt, ego, or anger.
What was projected onto me does not belong to me.

I know who I am.
I am honest. I am intentional. I am discerning.
Setting boundaries does not make me cold—it makes me wise.

I did not lose anything by choosing myself.
I protected my peace, my heart, and my future.
A reaction rooted in disrespect confirms I made the right decision.

I forgive myself for feeling disappointed.
I forgive myself for hoping.
And I let go—without bitterness, without shame.

I am safe to trust my intuition.
I am allowed to walk away the moment something feels wrong.
I am becoming clearer, stronger, and more grounded with every experience.

I choose peace over chaos.
Clarity over confusion.
Self-respect over explanation.

I breathe.
I release.
I move forward—lighter.

There comes a moment when you stop explaining yourself and start protecting your peace. Not because you don’t care, but because you finally care enough about yourself. You learned that staying quiet is sometimes stronger than reacting, and walking away can be healthier than winning an argument.

Choosing calm doesn’t mean you avoided the truth it means you refused to let chaos live rent-free in your mind. Distance isn’t punishment; it’s self-respect. And boundaries aren’t walls they’re filters that decide what deserves access to you.

Some people don’t get upset because you left. They get upset because they no longer control your reactions, your energy, or your availability. Your growth disrupts the dynamics they were comfortable with. Your silence forces them to sit with their behavior.

But you don’t owe explanations to those who thrived on your tolerance. Healing looks like peace. Growth looks like deciding for yourself. And maturity seems like knowing when to disengage.

Let them be uncomfortable. You didn’t change you evolved. And the fact that you chose peace over drama is proof that you’re finally prioritizing what truly matters.

I’m sorry, but there are still some people I cannot forgive—not because I’m bitter, but because forgiving them would mean pretending the damage didn’t matter. Some pain wasn’t a misunderstanding or a small mistake; it was repeated, it was intentional, or it was ignored when it mattered most. Healing doesn’t require me to rewrite the truth just to make others more comfortable. Acknowledging the impact of what happened is part of honoring myself and the strength it took to move forward.

Forgiveness is often treated like a requirement for peace, but peace can also come from boundaries and clarity. I’ve learned that I can release the anger without reopening the door, and I can move on without excusing what hurt me. Not forgiving doesn’t mean I’m stuck—it means I’m aware. It means I value my well-being enough to recognize that some lessons don’t need reconciliation, just acceptance and distance.

إجراءات الاتصالات قبل وأثناء وبعد انتخابات 2026

إن هيئة الاتصالات الأوغندية، وبموجب المادة 5(1)(b) من قانون الاتصالات الأوغندي، الفصل 103 (النسخة المنقحة 2023)، مُكلَّفة بمنع ومراقبة وتفتيش وترخيص والإشراف والتحكم وتنظيم خدمات الاتصالات.
كما تُخوِّل المادة 5(1)(x) الهيئة بوضع مبادئ ومعايير الحظر، ومراقبة وإنفاذ الامتثال المتعلق بالمحتوى.

وعليه، وضمن التزامنا بضمان عملية انتخابية آمنة، نود إبلاغ الجمهور بإجراءات أمن الاتصالات المهمة التي سيتم تنفيذها قبل وأثناء وبعد الانتخابات القادمة.

1. السحب من البنوك

يُنصح جميع الأفراد الذين لديهم أموال في البنوك بسحب أموالهم مبكرًا قبل 8 يناير 2026 إذا كانوا ينوون استخدامها خلال فترة الانتخابات.
يرجى العلم بأن الخدمات المصرفية ستكون غير متاحة خلال هذه الفترة.

2. خدمات الأموال عبر الهاتف المحمول

سيتم إيقاف جميع خدمات الأموال عبر الهاتف المحمول وخدمة Airtel Money على مستوى الدولة ابتداءً من 8 يناير 2026.

نحثّ العملاء وجميع المستخدمين على الاستعداد مسبقًا لتجنّب أي إزعاج.

3. خدمات الإنترنت

ولضمان أمن العملية الانتخابية، سيتم تعليق خدمات الإنترنت قبل أسبوع من الانتخابات، وستظل متوقفة طوال فترة الانتخابات.

نشجّع جميع المواطنين على ممارسة حقهم الديمقراطي في التصويت سلميًا للمرشحين الذين يختارونهم، والتحلي بالصبر أثناء فرز النتائج وإعلانها.

Warqad Furan oo ku Socota Shacabka Gobonnimo-doonka Ogaadeenya.

Shacabka sharafta leh ee Ogaadeenya,
Salaan diirran kadib,
Warqaddan waxay ka timaaddaa qalbi idinla mid ah—qalbi ka gubanaya xaq-darro, ku riyoonaya xorriyad, kuna kalsoon awoodda shacabka marka ay qaddiyad mideysan u istaagaan.

Ogaadeenya waa dhul taariikh, dhaqan & dhiig Soomaaliyeed leh, balse muddo dheer ku hoos jira gumeysi, tacaddi & duudsi joogto ah. Xuquuqdeenna aasaasiga ah waa nala duudsiyay, codkeenna waa la aamusiiyay, kheyraadkeenna waa la boobay, dadkeenana waa la silciyay. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, taariikhdu mar walba waxay caddaysay in qaddiyad xaq ah aan weligeed la dabar goyn karin.

Shacabka gobonnimo-doonka ahow,
Waa waqti ay khasab tahay in aan u guntanno qaddiyaddeenna, aan ka gudubno kala aragti duwanaanshaha, qabyaaladda &  kala shakiga. Cadawgu wuu ka faa’iideystaa kala qaybsanaanteenna, balse wuxuu ka baqaa midnimadeenna.

Xorriyaddu ma timaaddo si sahlan, mana aha hadiyad la bixiyo—waa xuquuq loo halgamo. Halgankaasi wuxuu u baahan yahay:

Qowmiyadda Sheekhaal & Dowladnimada.

Doorkii Taariikheed (1014–1800 M)
Qowmiyadda Sheekhaal waxay door weyn ka qaadatay dhismaha iyo hoggaaminta dowlado Islaami ah oo ka hanaqaaday Bariga Afrika intii u dhexeysay 1014 ilaa 1800 Miilaadiga, waxaana kamid ahaa:
1. Abadir Dynasty (Harar Kingdom)
2. Hadiya Sultanate
3. Fakhruddin Sultanate
4. Walashma Dynasty
5. Shewo Sultanate
6. Cumardiin Sultanate
(Geledi – Gasargude – Goobroon – Galwager)
7. Adal / Ifat Sultanate
8. Dawaro Sultanate.

Doorkii Dowladnimo ee Casriga (1960–2022)
Laga soo bilaabo xornimada ilaa 2022, Qowmiyadda Sheekhaal waxay si muuqata uga qayb qaadatay:
Dhismaha iyo difaaca Qaranka Soomaaliyeed
Inkastoo aysan inta badan qaban xilalka ugu sarreeya, haddana marar badan waxaa lagu tilmaami jiray laf-dhabarta dowladnimada.

Jagadii ugu sarreysay ee ay qabtaan:
Guddoomiyaha Baarlamaanka Soomaaliya Waxaa qabtay AU Prof. Maxamed Ibraahim Liqliiqato
1982–1991 – Guddoomiyihii Baarlamaanka ee ugu muddada dheeraa xilligii Maxamed Siyaad Barre.

Xilligii Gumaysiga:
Xilligii gumaysiga, gaar ahaan koonfurta Soomaaliya, Qowmiyadda Sheekhaal waxay kaalin weyn ka qaadatay halgankii dib-u-xoraynta dalka.

1956 Maxamed Sheekh Jamaal (Jamaal Jabiye) – Guddoomiye & Duqa Muqdisho
Wuxuu ku dhiirrigeliyay beeshiisa iyo bulshada inay si buuxda uga hortagaan gumaysiga
Waxay dagaal la galeen ilaa 50,000 askari oo Talyaani ah, gaar ahaan Shabeellaha Hoose wayna ka saareen halkaas Talyaaniga.

Doorkii Burburka Kadib:
Waxay ka shaqeeyeen badbaadinta iyo dib-u-heshiisiinta bulshada
Waxay dhexdhexaadiyeen qabaa’ilkii ku dagaallamay Muqdisho Waxay fureen iskuullo iyo jaamacado.

Hal-ku-dhiggooda wuxuu noqday:
“Qoriga dhig, Qalinka qaado”.

Caafimaad & Gargaarka Bulshada:
Markii ay dhakhaatiirtii Soomaaliyeed ka qaxeen dalka:
Dr. Ibrahim Dusuuqi iyo
Dr. Cali Baashi Rooraaye, waxay ahaayeen dhakhaatiirtii kaliya ee Muqdisho ka howlgalaysay, kuna daaweyn jirtay bulshada
Waxay sidoo kale dalka keeneen:
Hay’ado Islaami ah
Taageero waxbarasho
Daryeelka agoonta

UPDATE: Dr. Aminah Zawedde, PS @MoICT_Ug, and @UCC_Official confirmed there is no planned internet shutdown during the elections, calling such claims false and malicious.

She stressed media responsibility, warning against misinformation, incitement, declaring unofficial results, and live broadcasting violence.
#TV1UPDATES

The Permanent Secretary - @MoICT_Ug, @azawedde, clarified that the Government of Uganda has NOT planned or announced any internet shutdown during elections. Noting that claims to the contrary are false, malicious, and designed to sow fear. "Such misinformation undermines public confidence and threatens national calm at a critical hour," she noted.

She added, "We are committed to digital inclusion and access to information, recognizing ICTs as pillars of democracy, not tools for destabilization, but freedom comes with responsibility. Media must not be used to incite violence, spread falsehoods, or declare unofficial results. Live broadcasting of riots or violence is prohibited, as it escalates tension and risks lives."

UPHS waxaa madashan ku matalay 𝗚𝘂𝗱𝗱𝗼𝗼𝗺𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗨𝗿𝘂𝗿𝗸𝗮, 𝗠𝗮𝗱𝗮𝘅𝗮 𝗪𝗮𝘅𝗯𝗮𝗿𝗮𝘀𝗵𝗮𝗱𝗮, 𝗠𝗮𝗱𝗮𝘅𝗮 𝗔𝗿𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗗𝗶𝗯𝗮𝗱𝗱𝗮, 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗠𝗮𝗱𝗮𝘅𝗮 𝗪𝗮𝗰𝘆𝗶𝗴𝗲𝗹𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗖𝗮𝗮𝗳𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗮𝗱𝗸𝗮, kuwaas oo si firfircoon uga qayb qaatay doodaha iyo is-dhaafsiga aqoonta.

Sidoo kale, waxaan si gaar ah u bogaadinaynaa 𝗖𝗼𝘂𝗻𝗰𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗼𝗿 𝗞𝗮𝘀𝗶𝗺 𝗔𝗹𝗶, Leader of the Kensington and Chelsea Labour Group, oo ahaa 𝗞𝗲𝘆𝗻𝗼𝘁𝗲 𝗦𝗽𝗲𝗮𝗸𝗲𝗿, kana qayb qaatay fadhiga su’aalaha iyo jawaabaha (Q&A). Faallo: Isku-shaandhayn mise Imtixaan Hoggaamineed?

Hadal-haynta sii xoogaysanaysa ee ku saabsan isku-shaandhayn lagu samaynayo golaha wasiirrada Somaliland ma aha arrin ku kooban xafiisyada siyaasadda oo keliya, balse waxay noqotay mawduuc si toos ah u taabanaya kalsoonida shacabka ee xukuumadda sannad jirsatay. 

Indhaha dadweynaha ayaa si toos ah ugu jeeda Madaxtooyada, iyadoo la sugayo in Madaxweyne Cabdiraxmaan Cirro uu qaado tallaabo muujinaysa jihada hoggaamineed ee uu damacsan yahay.

Shacabka saluugga muujinaya ma diiddana mabda’a saami-qaybsiga ee madaxweynuhu ku dhisay xukuumaddiisa; taa beddelkeeda, waxay u arkaan arrin horumar leh in deegaano muddo dheer ka maqnaa talada dalka lagu soo daro golaha wasiirrada. Arrintani waxay xoojisay dareenka wada-lahaanshaha qaranka, waana tallaabo mudan bogaadin.

Si kastaba ha ahaatee, saami-qaybsigu keliya ma dabooli karo baahida hoggaan wax-ku-ool ah. Cabashada ugu weyn ee bulshada ka imanaysa waxay ku wajahan tahay waxqabadka iyo jihaynta siyaasadeed ee qaar ka mid ah wasiirrada, kuwaas oo la rumaysan yahay in aanay weli la jaanqaadin culayska mas’uuliyadda ay hayaan iyo rajadii laga qabay xukuumadda.

Isku-shaandhaynta la hadal-hayaa, haddii ay dhacdo, waxay noqon doontaa imtixaan dhab ah oo lagu cabbiro hoggaaminta Madaxweyne Cirro. 

* ma noqon doontaa mid ku salaysan qancinta aragtiyo siyaasadeed, mise mid ku dhisan waxqabad, karti iyo isla-xisaabtan?. Jawaabta su’aashan ayaa go’aamin doonta sida xukuumaddiisu uga gudbi doonto marxaladdan kalsooni-raadinta ah.

Ugu dambayn, shacabka Somaliland ma sugayaan magacyo cusub oo keliya; mise waxay sugayaan farriin cad oo muujinaysa in madaxwaynuhu qalinkiisa ku cugto madax xil-kas ah, Curin siyaasaddeed & hal-abuur leh, kuwaasi oo dadkooda iyo dalkooda ugu adeega sinnaan iyo caddaalad, kuna hagga dhabbaha guusha.

Haddaba madaxweynuhu diyaar ma u yahay inuu wax ka beddelo meel kasta oo uu ka muuqdo gaabis ama tamar-darro?. 

Isku-shaandhayntu, haddii si xeel dheer loo maareeyo, waxay noqon kartaa fursad lagu xoojiyo kalsoonida; haddii kalena, waxay sii fogayn kartaa farqiga u dhexeeya rajada shacabka iyo xaqiiqada hoggaaminta.

Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland Ha Noollaato.

Golaha Nabadda iyo Ammaanka Midowga Afrika (AU PSC) ayaa si adag u cambaareeyay aqoonsiga hal-dhinac ah ee Israa’1l ay siisay maamulka Somaliland, intii lagu guda jiray kulankii Wasiirrada ee 1324-aad ee Golaha, isagoo ugu baaqay in si degdeg ah looga laabto tallaabadaas.

Goluhu wuxuu mar kale adkeeyay mowqifkiisa aan leexleexadka lahayn ee ku aaddan ilaalinta madax-bannaanida, midnimada, wadajirka dhuleed iyo xasilloonida Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, si waafaqsan Axdiga Aasaasiga ah ee Midowga Afrika, Hab-raaca Golaha Nabadda iyo Ammaanka, iyo Axdiga Qaramada Midoobay.

Sidoo kale, Golaha ayaa carrabka ku adkeeyay in cid ama hay’ad toona aysan haysan awood ama sharci ay ku beddesho qaab-dhismeedka dhuleed ee dal xubin ka ah Midowga Afrika, isla markaana bayaannada noocaas ah ay yihiin kuwo waxba kama jiraan marka loo eego sharciga caalamiga ah.

LA MÉTHODE HO'OPONOPONO 💫

La méthode Ho'oponopono est une ancienne pratique hawaïenne de réconciliation et de guérison qui repose sur le principe de prendre la responsabilité de sa vie et de ses relations. Elle se base sur quatre phrases essentielles :

1. Je suis désolé(e)
2. Pardon
3. Merci
4. Je t'aime

👉🏻 Bienfaits dans le quotidien :

- Apaisement émotionnel : Elle aide à libérer les émotions négatives et à réduire le stress.
- Amélioration des relations : En pratiquant le pardon et l'amour, on favorise des interactions plus saines.
- Clarté mentale : Elle encourage la prise de conscience de ses pensées et actions, permettant une meilleure gestion des conflits internes.

- Merci : En vous concentrant sur le chakra de la Gorge jusqu'au chakra du Plexus Solaire, pour exprimer votre gratitude et votre vérité tout en renforçant la confiance en soi.

- Je t'aime : Connectez-vous avec le chakra Cœur pour cultiver l'amour inconditionnel.

Cette pratique intégrée peut apaiser votre enfant intérieur et harmoniser vos chakras, favorisant un bien-être global.

🕺🏽 Part 1 — “I Got Eight Kids & a Ringing Phone”

I got eight kids by five women, and before you ask—yeah, I know how that sound. Every time I say it out loud, it hit different, like I’m confessing to something I never planned but somehow kept choosing. My life don’t run on a calendar, it run on notifications. Group chats, missed calls, screenshots, voice notes, “we need to talk,” “did you send the money,” “your son acting different,” “your daughter asked about you.” It never stops.

I wake up every day already behind. Somebody mad before I even brush my teeth. One baby mama mad about time, another mad about money, another mad because I didn’t respond fast enough, and two of them… I still sleep with. That’s the part nobody ever wants to talk about out loud. The same women cussing me out be the same ones pulling me back in when it get quiet at night. Trauma bonds, history, comfort—call it whatever you want. I call it familiar chaos.

I don’t even try to keep stories straight anymore. Everybody get a version of me. The tired dad. The misunderstood man. The victim. The provider. The one “trying his best.” And for a long time, it worked. They stayed beefing with each other so nobody ever really focused on me. As long as the women was mad at each other, I could move how I wanted.

Birthdays overlap. School events collide. Somebody always feel slighted. I’ll be at one kid’s game thinking about the argument I’m about to have with a woman who swear I favor another household. I tell myself I’m holding it down, but truth is I’m juggling fires and calling it warmth.

The kids love me. That’s the part I cling to. When they run to me, when they call me Dad, when they don’t know nothing about the mess behind the scenes. I tell myself it’s worth it. That I’m built for this. That a real man handle his responsibilities no matter how complicated it get.

But lately… something been shifting. The noise don’t hit the same. The drama that used to distract me feel heavier. And I don’t know yet that the biggest problem in my life ain’t the women fighting—

It’s what happens when they stop.

The Albanese Labor Government will establish a Royal Commission on Antisemitism and Social Cohesion in response to the Bondi terrorist attack.

The Government has asked Former High Court Justice the Hon Virginia Bell AC to serve as Commissioner.

The Government has asked Commissioner Bell to report before the end of the year, and to ensure this inquiry does not prejudice any future criminal proceedings. 

The Royal Commission will cover four key areas, as set out in the Letters Patent.

1. Tackling antisemitism by investigating the nature and prevalence of antisemitism in institutions and society, and its key drivers in Australia, including ideologically and religiously motivated extremism and radicalisation.

2. Making recommendations that will assist law enforcement, border control, immigration and security agencies to tackle antisemitism, including through improvements to guidance and training within law enforcement, border control, immigration, and security agencies to respond to antisemitic conduct.

3. Examining the circumstances surrounding the antisemitic Bondi terrorist attack on 14 December 2025.

4. Making any other recommendations arising out of the inquiry for strengthening social cohesion in Australia and countering the spread of ideologically and religiously motivated extremism in Australia.

Antisemitism has no place in Australia. 

This Royal Commission will deliver the right outcome for our national unity and our national security.

We are stronger when we stand together, with Jewish Australians, against antisemitism, hatred and terror.

Global peace talks officially began in Paris today as U.S. leaders joined international counterparts in high-level discussions aimed at easing global tensions and ending ongoing conflicts. The meetings bring together diplomats, security officials, and policymakers from multiple countries, with a strong focus on conflict resolution, humanitarian protection, and long-term stability. U.S. representatives said the talks are centered on building trust, coordinating ceasefire efforts, and creating frameworks for lasting peace. Paris was chosen as the venue due to its long tradition of hosting major diplomatic negotiations. Observers say the gathering reflects growing international urgency to reduce violence and prevent further escalation worldwide. While expectations remain cautious, officials stressed that dialogue is a necessary first step toward meaningful solutions. As talks continue, people affected by war and instability are watching closely, hoping the discussions will lead to concrete actions, reduced fighting, and renewed cooperation among global powers committed to peace.

France has passed a new law banning the hijab in public spaces, triggering widespread debate across the country and beyond. Supporters of the law argue that it protects France’s principle of secularism, saying public spaces should remain religiously neutral to ensure equality and social cohesion. They believe the ban reinforces shared civic values and prevents religious influence in everyday public life.

Critics, however, strongly oppose the decision, stating that it limits individual freedom and disproportionately affects Muslim women who choose to wear the hijab as an expression of their faith and identity. Many argue that true equality means allowing people to practice their beliefs freely without state interference.

The law has intensified broader discussions about where the line should be drawn between secular governance and religious liberty. It raises complex questions about cultural identity, women’s rights, personal choice, and whether restricting visible religious symbols truly promotes unity—or instead deepens social divisions.

My brother's wife, Maggie is pregnant with their first child. For their baby shower, Maggie sent me a wish list. It consisted exclusively of pricey items: a $1,200 stroller, a $300 diaper bag, a $500 bassinet, a $400 "designer" high chair, etc.

I got upset when I saw the list because I didn't have that much money. I'm a teacher and a single mom to twins. But I did want to make something special. I knit really well, so I decided to put all my heart into a handmade gift. I spent 50+ hours knitting an intricate baby blanket out of merino wool, personalized with the baby's name embroidered in the corner. Every stitch was done with love.

At the baby shower, Maggie glowed in her designer maternity dress while her friends in floral jumpsuits sipped mimosas. I felt a little out of place but proud of the box in my hands.

When gift time came, Maggie opened diaper bags, expensive gadgets, and stacks of boutique onesies. Applause, squeals, the whole nine yards.

Then she got to mine.

She pulled the blanket out, glanced at it, and her nose wrinkled. "Oh, a cheapy-beepy thing. Why on earth didn't you buy from the LIST? This will shrink after the first wash. Honestly, I'll probably just throw it out."
Laughter rippled through the room. The kind that makes your skin burn. My ears went hot, and I wanted the floor to swallow me whole.

Then, a chair SCRAPED against the floor. Maggie's dad stood up. His voice was calm but carried across the room like a bell.
"Maggie. Look at me. Now." ⬇️

'AITAH for telling my SIL her son is not longer invited to my house, ever?' I (f26) have been married to my husband (m30) for two years. I am currently 18 weeks pregnant as well. My sister in law is f31, and she has a 15 year old son, Riley and a 6 year old son. Riley is a very troubled boy. I don’t really know the details, but I have always loved my SIL and her children, so she tells me about his d__g and alcohol issues, starting when he was just a kid. He’s been in legal trouble and in and out of clinical settings and therapy. According to her, Riley been getting better recently. So, she asked my husband and I if he and his little brother who is 6, could stay with us for just a few days while she and her husband went to a funeral. We said yes, of course. Well to make a long story short, at first the boys were super nice and happy. We watched a movie, I made us dinner, the 6 year old even told me about his plans for the future. It was all very nice. And then, Riley got into an argument with my husband. I was in the next room over and heard it start. It was because my husband moved Riley’s jacket. I walked in just to see what was happening. Riley was very upset and my husband wasn’t doing a very good job calming him, to be honest. I walked up and gently suggest Riley come with me to cool off. He agreed. However when we were walking to the bedroom where I was going to talk with him calmly, Riley suddenly decided he wanted to try and fight my husband again, and shoved me into the wall to run back. He shoved me hard enough that my head hit a jacket hook on the wall and I was bleeding. After that, my husband called my sister in law and demanded they come home. My husband took Riley to a hotel for the night, and I stayed with the 6 year old who was a sobbing mess after this. So, I told my SIL I will never have Riley in my house again. She was so apologetic but I didn’t care- I’m pregnant, and Riley knows this, and he shoved me. He consistently tried to fight with my husband. He makes his brother cry all the time. My SIL wasn’t even mad I said I didn’t want Riley there anymore- but she thinks it’s unfair I said never again, and that his brother can still come. But I don’t. AITAH?

Taliyaha Ciidanka Dhulka ee Xoogga Dalka, General Sahal Cabdullaahi Cumar ayaa shalay duleedka magaalada kula hadlay ciidamadan, oo Warbaahinta Dowladda ay ku sheegtay in ay yihiin kuwo cusub oo tababar loo soo xiray.

Taliyaha oo maalmihii u dambeeyay ku sugnaa gobolka ayaa ciidamada kula dardaarmay inay la dagaalamaan cadowga, isla-markaana ay dalka ka ciribtiraan.

Taliyeyaasha Qaybaha 21aad iyo 27aad ee Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka oo ku sugan Matabaan ayaa dooranaya saraakiishii hoggaamin lahayd hawlgalka lagu wado in laga bilaabo Gobolka Hiiraan.

Korneyl Maxamed Dhagaweyne iyo G/dhexe Cali Axmed Xaashi (Cagey) ayay wararku sheegayaan in ay ciidamada u diyaarinayaan in marka hore mintidiinta Al Shabaab laga kiciyo dhulka ay ka joogaan inta u dhaxeyso Magaalooyinka Matabaan iyo Maxaas, ka dibna ay qabtaan Maxaas.

Maxaas ayaa dhacda meel istiraatiiji ah, marka aad eegto in ay saaran tahay xuduudda Gobolada Hiiraan iyo Galgaduud, waana tan Shabaabka u sahleysa in ay si toos ah isugu gooshaan Gobolada Bartamaha & Koonfurta Somaliya.

Ciidamadan ayaa waxaa la qiyaasaya in ay boor badan ka kicin doonaan goobaha ay isku fara saaraan kooxaha argagixisada, haddii aysan kooxahaasi dib u gurasho samayn.

Warbaahinta Dhacdo

Hambalyo Korneyl Ibraahim Aadan Dhayow,
Taliyaha Hoggaanka Dambi-baarista (CID) ee Ciidanka Booliiska Soomaaliyeed.
Allaha kula garab galo xilka culus ee laguu magacaabay, kana dhigo mid kuu sahlan oo miro dhal ah. Allaha ku siiyo garasho, caddaalad iyo go’aan sax ah.
Eebbow, adigaa wax walba og oo naxariis badan. Waa mid sharaf leh in xilkan uu qabto nin waayo-aragnimo, aqoon iyo gobonnimo isku daray, kana turjumaya masuuliyad iyo karti hoggaamineed.
Guul iyo horumar ayaan kuu rajaynayaa, adiga iyo guud ahaan Ciidanka Booliiska Soomaaliyeed.
Waa runtii ina been ma sheegin cali dheere iyo khawaarij tiisa ku shah karsata

Degmada Xarardheere  

waa degmo ku taalla gobolka Mudug ee Dowlad-goboleedka Galmudug ee Soomaaliya. Degmadani waxay muddo dheer la daalaa dhacaysay xaalado amni darro, colaado iyo abaaro baahsan, kuwaas oo sababay baahiyo bini’aadantinimo iyo barakac ballaaran.

8-da Janaayo 2026, waxaa degmada Xarardheere soo gaartay Hay’adda DRC ,qeybteeda Galmudug, iyadoo waday kaarar gargaar lacageed, kuwaas oo halkii kaar bishii lagu shubo $100 USD.
Tirada kaararka nala xaqiijiyay waxay gaarayeen 700 kaar, inkastoo ay jiraan tuhunno sheegaya in ay ka badnaayeen tiradaas.

⸻

1. Tirada kaararka iyo baahida dhabta ah

Degmada Xarardheere iyo deegaanada hoostaga waxaa lagu qiyaasaa in ay ku nool yihiin ku dhawaad 110,000 oo qof.
Sidaas darteed, 700 kaar (xitaa haddii ay intaas gaaraan) ma daboolayaan baahida dadka degmada, gaar ahaan dadka ay saameeyeen abaaraha iyo colaadaha.
Arrintaasi waxay dhalinaysaa su’aal ah:
➡️ Maxaa loo soo koobay tirada kaararka? Mise kaararka qaar ayaa meel kale loo weeciyay?

⸻

2. Kaararku ma gaareen dadkii u baahnaa?

Jawaabtu waa Maya.

Markii hay’addu timid magaalada, waxay si degdeg ah ula fariisatay maamulka degmada, waxaana la isla gartay in loo yeero odayaasha dhaqanka / horjoogayaasha beelaha, kuwaas oo lagu wargeliyay in la helay 100 kaar.

Odoyaasha, oo horay uga shakisanay maamulka degmada in musuqmaasuq dhici karo, ayaa arrintaas qaadacay, kana tagey kulankii.

Markii ay odoyaashu ka baxeen, maamulka degmada wuxuu wacay hoggaamiyeyaasha Macawiisleyda, kuwaas oo la siiyay 23 kaar, midkiibana ay ku qoreen ciidanka ay xukumaan.
Sidaas ayaana looga reebay dadkii masaakiinta ahaa, kuwaas oo soo lugaynayay masaafo dheer markii ay maqleen in kaarar la keenay Degmada Xarardheere.

⸻

3. Musuqmaasuqii ka dhacay goobaha diiwaangelinta

Waxyaabaha ugu yaabka badnaa ee ka dhacay goobaha diiwaangelinta kaararka waxaa ka mid ahaa:
 • Dadka Masaakiintaa Ayaa  loo dhiibayay warqad ay ku qoran yihiin magacyo, lambaro iyo xog dhammeystiran,
 • Warqaddaas waxaa lagu amrayay inuu isku diiwaangeliyo ,
 • Taasoo u sahashay in maamulka degmada uu si toos ah u qoro magacyada dadka ay iyagu doorteen, una adeegsadaan musuqmaasuq iyagoo Numbero Badan Ka soo Jabsaday Shirkada Hormuud.

⸻

4. Beelaha si gaar ah loo duudsiiyay Kaararka 

Beelaha Axmed Farah iyo Shiikhaal, oo ka mid ah beelaha ugu nugul deegaanka, waxba lagama siin kaararka gargaarka.
Sababta keliya ee loo diiday ayaa ahayd in aysan haysan Macawiisley u qaada.
Tani waa cadaalad darro cad iyo takoor lagu sameeyay beelo nugul.

⸻

5. Khiyaanadii loo geystay dadka reer baadiyaha

Boqolaal qof oo reer baadiye ah ayaa isugu yimid goobihii kaararka lagu bixinayay.
Si loo qanciyo, waxaa lagu sameeyay diiwaangelin been ah, waxaana la siiyay warqado.
Markii ay tageen miisaska wax lagu qorayay, waxaa la arkay in magacyo iyo lambarro horay loo diyaariyay oo ay sameysteen maamulka degmadu.

⸻

Baaq

Sidaas darteed, waxaan si cad oo masuuliyad leh ugu baaqayaa:

👉 Madaxweynaha Dowlad-goboleedka Galmudug, Mudane Ahmed Abdi Kaarie (Qoor-Qoor)
👉 Iyo guud ahaan hoggaanka sare ee Galmudug
Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha,Federaalka iyo Dib -U- heshiisinta  Galmudug Hayada  #DRC

in ay si degdeg ah u soo farageliyaan arrintan, una sameeyaan baaritaan madax-bannaan, si loo hubiyo:
 • Cidda mas’uulka ka ah musuqmaasuqa,
 • In gargaarka la gaarsiiyo dadkii loogu talagalay,
 • In cadaalad loo sameeyo beelaha iyo dadka la dulmiyay.

Agaasimaha Guud ee Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha, Federaalka iyo Dib u heshiisiinta Xukuumadda Federaalka Soomaaliya Mudane Abdulkadir Ali ayaa guddoomiyey kulanka billaha ah ee Wasaaradda, kaas oo ay ka qeybgaleen Agaasimeyaasha waaxyaha, Madax-qeybeedyada iyo Lataliyeyaasha sare ee Wasaaradda.

Intii uu kulanku socday waxaa si qoto dheer looga wada hadlay ajendayaal muhiim ah oo ay ugu horreeyaan dhameystirka Qorshaha Wasaaradda ee sanadka 2026, kaas oo si buuxda ula jaanqaadaya Qorshaha Horumarinta Qaranka, iyo sidoo kale kor u qaadista hufnaanta shaqo, tayeynta waxqabadka, iyo xoojinta isla xisaabtanka howlwadeennada Wasaaradda.

Sidoo kale, kulanka waxaa lagu diyaariyey jadwal shaqo oo la fulin karo, kana tarjumaya mudnaanta iyo howlaha kala duwan ee Wasaaradda, si loo hubiyo hirgelin wax ku ool ah oo waafaqsan himilooyinka iyo waajibaadka Wasaaradda. 

Ugu dambeyntii, Agaasimaha Guud ee Wasaaradda mudane Cabdul ayaa adkeeyey muhiimadda ay leedahay in si wadajir ah loo fuliyo go’aannada ka soo baxay kulanka, loona xoojiyo wada shaqeynta iyo mas’uuliyadda guud.
